edd76e337167.88c1604841d0: The Instagram feed gets plenty of views but minimal clicks or messages. Existing captions served only as photo complements rather than strategic elements driving audience action. A particular challenge was managing two Instagram accounts with different roles without diluting the brand message.
50b4a4630e6c.630b42a31fe4: This campaign focused on increasing meaningful interactions, clicks, and direct messages through copy optimization.

Clear Caption Structure
Each post was designed with a flow: compelling hook, benefit explanation, and specific call-to-action.
619002cb7688.caee924419c3:
Per-Account Customization
Writing style and text length were tailored to each account's position, then tested for effectiveness.
4cd40d20c5f9.bbad3d28fe72:
Data-Driven Refinement
Text length, CTA placement, and writing style were tested and analyzed weekly for continuous improvement.

befeb8b45585.609b16ae46da: Two accounts managed harmoniously without compromising brand identity.
2528c4ec674c.dbcda9eea26d: CTAs could be strengthened within the first 3 lines of captions, since many users only read the beginning before tapping "see more".
